subcodes.first_line: Blessed art thou, O My leaf, and blessed art thou, inasmuch as thou hast attained unto My Beauty and hast drunk of the Kawthar of My presence and partaken of the Tasním [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی لک یا ورقتی و طوبی لک بما فزت بجمالی و شربت کوثر لقائی و تجرعت من تسنیم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @thankfulness; gratitude
